narrative:
Bainbridge Twp township has 9,828 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a clear Republican lean of 10.6 percentage points.
